_note: userMessage is shown to the end user. Keep it actionable and jargon-free.

1.userMessage: Payment timed out. Please check your connection and try again.

2.userMessage: Payment gateway is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.

3.userMessage: This card has been flagged as restricted. Please contact your bank immediately.

4.userMessage: Your payment was denied by your bank. Please contact your bank or use a different card.

5.userMessage: Please call your bank to authorise this transaction.

7.userMessage: Card security code (CVV) or 3D Secure data is incorrect. Please check and try again.

8.userMessage: This card type is not accepted. Please use a Visa or Mastercard.

9.userMessage: Unable to process this transaction. Please try again in a moment.

10.userMessage: Your card has been blocked. Please contact your bank to resolve this.

11.userMessage: The transaction amount is invalid. Please check and try again.

12.userMessage: Invalid budget period selected. Please contact support.

13.userMessage: Transaction reversal was unsuccessful. Please contact support.

14.userMessage: The card number is invalid. Please check your card details and try again.

15.userMessage: Card data could not be read. Please try again or use a different card.

16.userMessage: The card expiry date is invalid or expired. Please check and try again.

17.userMessage: Invalid account selection. Please try again with a different option.

18.userMessage: Invalid authorisation code. Please try again.

19.userMessage: Incorrect PIN entered. Please try again. Too many attempts will lock your card.

20.userMessage: Payment terminal error. Please contact support.

22.userMessage: This card type is not supported for this transaction.

23.userMessage: Card information could not be found. Please try again or use a different card.

24.userMessage: Invalid recurring payment account. Please contact support.

26.userMessage: Contactless payment is not allowed for this transaction. Please try another method.

27.userMessage: Please present your card again to complete the transaction.

100.userMessage: Payment processing error. Please try again.

101.userMessage: Duplicate submission detected. Please contact support.

255.userMessage: A system error occurred. Please try again in a moment.

Insufficient funds on your card. Please check your balance or use a different card.

Please call your bank to authorise this transaction.

Your card has expired. Please use a valid card.
Your card has expired. Please use a valid card.
This card is not recognised by your bank. Please check the details or use a different card.
This card is restricted for online purchases. Please contact your bank.

fallback: Payment declined. Please try again or contact your bank for assistance.
